name: G.SCOTT-2
description: Rich noise layers with Gray-Scott modulation — vivid, organic
code:
// G.SCOTT-2 — rich noise layers, CA as organic modulator
caStream('tide_pool').out(o1)

// o2: layered noise background — three color fields blended
noise(2, 0.03).color(0.7, 0.25, 0.5)
  .add(noise(5, 0.02).rotate(()=>time*0.006).color(0.15, 0.45, 0.7), 0.4)
  .add(noise(1.2, 0.015).rotate(()=>-time*0.004).color(0.55, 0.4, 0.15), 0.3)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.025)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.02)
  .hue(()=>time*0.002)
  .brightness(0.06)
  .saturate(1.2)
  .out(o2)

// o0: feedback painting — bg feeds in, CA warps the texture
src(o0)
  .scale(1.001)
  .scrollX(()=>Math.sin(time*0.02)*0.001)
  .scrollY(()=>Math.cos(time*0.017)*0.0008)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.03)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.02)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.35)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.5, 0.02), 0.004)
  .modulateRotate(noise(0.3, 0.01), 0.003)
  .hue(()=>0.002)
  .luma(0.004, 0.06)
  .brightness(0.02)
  .saturate(1.15)
  .contrast(1.02)
  .out(o0)
